title: Noii patrioți: guralivi, slabi de minte, mincinoși și ipocriți
summary: The article criticizes the manufactured outrage by self-proclaimed 'patriots' over President Nicușor Dan's military plane being delayed at Paris Bourget airport due to weather conditions. A pseudo-journalist falsely claimed Swiss F-16s intercepted the presidential flight rather than escorting it as a gesture of gratitude, forcing Dan to release air traffic control recordings to counter disinformation. The author argues this fake patriotic hysteria overshadowed the actual purpose of the Paris trip — supporting Ukraine.
talking_points: Weather delays at Bourget airport were exploited by nationalist voices to manufacture a fake scandal about presidential dignity
A pseudo-journalist falsely claimed Swiss F-16s were intercepting rather than honoring the Romanian presidential flight, forcing the president to release ATC recordings
The manufactured controversy completely overshadowed the actual substance of the Paris meeting on supporting Ukraine
President Dan announced plans to create a counter-disinformation department at Cotroceni palace
The meaning of 'patriot' has been corrupted — once referring to those who served their country, now describing loud, dishonest hypocrites
author: Cristian Preda
